reviews.author: Thiep Mai Phuc
reviews.text: The largest artificial freshwater lake in Vietnam, providing and coordinating water from the Saigon River, the East and West canals, and dry water for more than 93,000 hectares of agricultural land in Tay Ninh and neighboring provinces. The lake surface is about 27,000 hectares wide, dubbed the “Great Lake” of Tay Ninh and spread across 3 provinces of Tay Ninh, Binh Duong and Ho Chi Minh City, the lake has a diverse ecosystem and many beautiful surrounding landscapes. around !

reviews.author: Ngo Minh Nghia
reviews.text: Quiet place to relax weekend, Just 80km from Hồ Chí Minh city. Best time to camp is from evening, overnight to morning. Noon is so hot, cause there is not so many house/ shop near there. Best View to Ba Den mountain. Sightseeing with Nui Cậu mountain, and Thái Sơn Pagoda, place to practice spiritual meditation or just simply take a deep breath with fresh air when away from busy city.

reviews.author: tiến nguyễn hoài
reviews.text: This is a huge lake and very peaceful.

reviews.author: Vương Chu
reviews.text: No place for eating and playing there. Bad road. However, the view is great. It's suitable for reducing stress.
